name: harvest-timekeeper
description: Configure and write Harvest time entries from git-backed Codex summaries.

interface.shortDescription: Configure Harvest entries from git summaries.
interface.longDescription: Harvest Timekeeper guides each user through personal-token setup, project/task discovery, note prefixes, repo mappings, work times, and git-backed daily time-entry creation or updates without storing secrets in the shared plugin.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $harvest-timesheet to configure Harvest and write yesterday's time entry.
